chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI C. P. No. D-276 of 2024 Date Order with signature of Judge Direction. 1. For orders on MIT-II Report. 2. For hearing of CMA No.6333/2024. 30.09.2025. Ms. Rabia Khan, Advocate for Respondent No.2. Mr. K. A. Vaswani, Assistant Advocate General Sindh. ------ No one is in attendance on behalf of the Petitioner and no intimation has been received. A perusal of the Order Sheet reflects that this was also the case on the previous date. Under the given circumstances, it appears that the Petitioner has lost interest in the matter. As such, the MIT Report is taken on record, whereas the listed Application stands dismissed for non-prosecution. JUDGE JUDGE MUBASHIR
